models.provenance: Official Megvii YOLOX 0.1.1rc0 release asset yolox_nano.onnx. Independently streamed and verified at exactly 3,659,407 bytes and the recorded SHA-256. The linked upstream tag declares Apache-2.0; this inventory is technical provenance, not legal advice. Weights are never committed.

models.origin: PaddleOCR / third-party wheel redistribution (unverified for GVF public release)
models.provenance: PUBLIC RELEASE BLOCKER: Desktop historically extracted this ONNX from a RapidOCR PyPI wheel. Redistribution rights, exact upstream commit, and license chain for the ONNX export have not been independently verified for the GVF open-source release. Interfaces and unit tests for text-map post-processing are implemented; download/setup remains blocked until provenance is documented and approved.
models.blockReason: Text detection weight provenance is unverified for public OSS redistribution. See docs/PROVENANCE.md. Runners must not download or claim these weights are available.
